---
title: Hosting cost estimator
description: A deterministic, model-free estimate of what it costs to host your project and serve your users, at three levels of scale — read from your build session.
tableOfContents: false
---

import CostEstimator from '../../../modules/cost-estimator/ui/CostEstimator.svelte';

A **deterministic** estimator — arithmetic and dated price snapshots only, no AI or
model calls. It reads your project's needs from the session you started in the
[Build Studio](/build/) and writes the estimate back, so the rest of the platform
can use it. Every figure is labelled with its provenance and source; prices not yet
confirmed against a primary source are marked **TODO: confirm**.

<CostEstimator client:load />
